items.title: Comprehensive Java Interview Questions
items.description: Comprehensive Java and Spring interview set spanning core Java, collections, Hibernate, and Spring.

items.title: Cryptography & Secure Design
items.description: Practical cryptography for Java engineers — AES-GCM, RSA, HMAC, digital signatures, key management, secure random, constant-time comparisons. Pairs with the Keys, Signing & TLS doc.

items.title: Database Patterns for Microservices
items.description: Transactional Outbox, Saga, CQRS, Event Sourcing, database-per-service, and data consistency patterns in distributed architectures.

items.title: Schema Migrations
items.description: Managing database schema changes safely in production — Flyway, Liquibase, zero-downtime migration patterns, and rollback strategies.

items.title: Spring Knowledge Base Overview
items.description: A comprehensive reference covering Spring Boot, Spring Framework, security, data access, web layer architecture, and interview preparation.
